description: Vaivora weapon effect data for Cleric tree classes.

design_patterns.linear_proficiency: Buffs existing rotation without changing shape.
design_patterns.gap_filling: Adds damage sources during CD gaps or creates passive damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Agni
effects: Emits fire to the front
Applies [Agni: Burn] debuff for 10 seconds
[Agni: Burn]: Continuous damage by 10% of total damage from Enira every 1 second
Damage received from caster of debuff increases by 20%

design_analysis.reasoning: Enira applies 10s DoT (10%/s of hit damage) + 20% damage taken debuff. Persistent damage + amp.

passive_bonuses: Adds immunity to Knockback and Knockdown to Foretell

level_4_effect.description: Creates [Aura] when casting [Counter Spell: Punisher]. Gives damage every 1 second by SFR per 1 hit of Counter Spell: Punisher. Decreases damage received by you and ally in range by 35%. Consumes 5% SP every 2 seconds. Recovers 10% of max SP when attacking enemy with [Prophecy: Shock] (CD 30s).

design_analysis.reasoning: Level 4 creates persistent Aura zone dealing Counter Spell damage per second. Autonomous AoE during other casts.

proc_mechanic.name: Convict
effects: Reduces cooldown of Holy Smash by 5 seconds
Reduces cooldown of Condemn by 10 seconds

level_4_effect.description: Apply buff for 30s when casting Sacred. Cast [Convict] and additionally hit front when Holy Smash is cast during buff. Convict Skill Factor is 20% of Sacred at current level. Max Target: 10.

design_analysis.reasoning: Level 4 appends Convict hit to Holy Smash during Sacred buff window.

proc_mechanic.name: Conviction
effects: Increases Duration of debuff according to target size (small: 2s, medium: 4s, large: 6s, extra large: 8s)
Duration of [Immolation: Melt Armor] increases to 20 seconds
Immolation debuff removed when unequipping Conviction

level_4_effect.description: Number of Emphatic Trust attacks +10. Emphatic Trust debuff removed when unequipping.

design_analysis.reasoning: Size-based debuff duration scaling + longer Melt Armor. Enhances existing Immolation mechanic.

proc_mechanic.name: Desition
effects: Create Magic Circle at Katadikazo location
Duration: 20 seconds
When circle disappears, spear drops with 4 consecutive strikes to 20 enemies
Damage = 50% of Katadikazo SFR
Applies buff to party over magic circle
[Holy],[Fire] Magic Skill, [Strike] Physical Skill Damage to buff target +20%
Circle duration -1s when buff target casts [Holy],[Fire],[Strike] skills

design_analysis.reasoning: Delayed 4-hit burst when magic circle expires + party damage buff zone for 20s. Autonomous damage + support.

proc_mechanic.name: Ema
effects: When [Great Blessing: Honor] not drawn, [Great Blessing: Peace] applied for Omikuji duration
[Great Blessing: Peace]: Increases Attack by 2.5%
Omikuji cooldown reset when [Great Blessing: Honor] or [Great Blessing: Hope] not drawn
[Great Blessing: Peace] cannot be stacked
Omikuji cooldown cannot be reset in a row

level_4_effect.description: Casting time of Kagura changed to 15 seconds, buff applies when cancelled midway. Final damage increases in proportion to casting of Kagura +4~8%. Not altered by items or skills related to casting.

design_analysis.reasoning: Guarantees useful buff from Omikuji (Peace fallback). Reduces RNG dependency.

level_4_effect.description: Adds 10% to decrease rate of Ein Sof's Cooldown by 10% (only applied to yourself). Changes recovery cycle of Ein Sof by 4 seconds.

design_analysis.reasoning: +50% FD on Anagrama + Ein Sof CD reduction. Direct amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Mass Heal: Cooling
effects: Reduces cooldown of Mass Heal depending on [Heal: Overload] stacks
Reduces 1 second of cooldown per stack
All [Heal: Overload] stacks consumed

level_4_effect.description: Apply buff for 12s when casting Mass Heal. Automatically casts [Heal] to party members nearby in 150 range to yourself every 3 seconds during buff.

design_analysis.reasoning: CD reduction on Mass Heal via stack consumption + auto-Heal passive at Level 4.

passive_bonuses: Duration of Statue increases to 2 min 30s
Cooldown of Statue increases to 3 minutes

proc_mechanic.name: Memory Leap
effects: Max 2 Statues can be installed
Move to other Statue on same map (created by same skill)
Move Cooldown 10 seconds
Cooldown of Memory Leap applied individually

level_4_effect.description: Block, Critical Resistance decrease effect added to Carve World Tree (Decrease Rate = Evasion). Increases Skill CD of targets struck by [Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia]. Increases [Statue] overheat +1. During [Carve World Tree: Grieztas] duration, pulls enemy to magic circle.

design_analysis.reasoning: Teleportation utility + crowd control. Support-focused, not damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Necrosis
effects: Applies [Incineration], [Black Death Steam] debuff of current level
Applies [Immobility] debuff to monster for 4 seconds
Maximum targets: 20
Removes debuffs applied by Necrosis when unequipped

design_analysis.reasoning: Pandemic auto-applies Incineration + Black Death Steam debuffs. Consolidates rotation steps.

passive_bonuses: Number of Consecutive hits of God Smash +1

proc_mechanic.name: Outrage
effects: 1 stack of Outrage buff per God Smash use
Duration: 8 seconds (Max. 3 stacks)
Character size increases with stacks
Magic damage received -50% when 3 stacks
Consume all stacks when using Ripper
With 3 stacks: Ripper skill damage for 5 seconds +30%

design_analysis.reasoning: Stack mechanic amplifies Ripper burst window (+30% with 3 stacks). Rewards repeated God Smash → Ripper cycle.

passive_bonuses: Final Damage of Lama's rank 2 skill +33%

design_analysis.reasoning: +33% FD on rank 2 skills + activation chance buff. Direct amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Protecting Grace
effects: Apply Skin Stone buff for 15 seconds to party members within 100 range
Stone Skin applied = caster's current level Stone Skill
Increases damage of Party member with Stone Skin buff by +100%

level_4_effect.description: Decreases Recovery cycle of Restoration by 50%

design_analysis.reasoning: Party-wide Stone Skin application + 100% damage buff to buffed members. Support amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Sacred Armor
effects: Binatio Duration changed to 30 minutes
Binatio buff removed when removing item

level_4_effect.description: Visible Talent Final Damage +100%. Buff removed when equipping item during Visible Talent.

design_analysis.reasoning: Permanent Binatio uptime (30 min duration). Removes maintenance.

proc_mechanic.name: Sacred Lightning
effects: Apply 5 stacks of [Brilliance] to target when Zaibas is accurate
Effect activates with 51+ [Brilliance] stacks
Skill factor 150% of current level Piety
Number of consecutive hits 4
Consumes 50 debuff stacks when effect activates
[Arts] Zaibas: Catatumbo [Brilliance] stacks increases by 3 times when activated

design_analysis.reasoning: Brilliance stacking triggers burst (150% Piety SFR × 4 hits) at 51 stacks. Builds toward passive proc.

proc_mechanic.name: Soul of Forest
effects: Activate [Soul of Forest] when casting Carnivory
Lasts for 5 seconds and damages enemies nearby by 0.5 seconds
Damage = skill factor of [Carnivory]

level_4_effect.description: Final Damage of Human Form increases by 10.5% additionally. Final Damage of Wolf's Spirit increases by 3.5% additionally.

design_analysis.reasoning: Carnivory triggers 5s AoE pulse at Carnivory SFR every 0.5s. Persistent damage zone.

proc_mechanic.name: Thunder Kick
proc_mechanic.trigger: 3 seconds after equipping / Attacking with Monk skills
effects: Activate [Thunder Kick] 3 seconds after equipping
Attack enemy within 100 range when attacking with Monk skills
Cooldown 5 seconds
CD decreases by 2 seconds during [Golden Bell Shield] buff
Skill factor 20% of current level Double Punch
Number of Targets: 15, Consecutive Hits: 2
[Thunder Kick: Extreme] gives double damage vs single target

level_4_effect.description: Activate [Palm Strike: Fist] at every strike cycle when casting Double Punch. Skill Factor: 27.5% of current level Palm Strike.

design_analysis.reasoning: Passive Thunder Kick fires every 5s during Monk attacks. Level 4 adds Palm Strike procs on Double Punch. Both fill gaps between main skills.
